Package laba5.commands

Interface Command

All Known Implementing Classes:
Add, Add_if_max, Clear, Count_by_form_of_education, Execute_script, Exit, Filter_contains_name, Help, Info, Print_field_ascending_should_be_expelled, Remove_by_id, Remove_last, Remove_lower, Save, Show, Update
public interface Command
интерфейс Comand выделяет общие методы для всех команд: execute, getName, getInfo.
